text:
I'll search for this reference to verify whether it exists.
The web search confirms that this is a real dataset. 
The dataset was posted on figshare on June 13, 2017, authored by Daniel Lowe, with reactions extracted by text-mining from United States patents published between 1976 and September 2016.
 The exact title as found on the dedicated figshare page is "Chemical reactions from US patents (1976-Sep2016)" and the publication year is 2017, matching the cited reference.

This is a dataset citation (non-paper source), which is a valid real-world research resource. The figshare page shows the dataset with Daniel Lowe as the author and 2017 as the publication year.

EXPLANATION: The reference is a real dataset on figshare, posted by Daniel Lowe in 2017. The exact title and author match the figshare entry.
LINK: https://figshare.com/articles/dataset/Chemical_reactions_from_US_patents_1976-Sep2016_/5104873
FOUND_TITLE: Chemical reactions from US patents (1976-Sep2016)
FOUND_AUTHORS: Daniel Lowe
FOUND_YEAR: 2017
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
